category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Belize.

title.en: China-to-Belize EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入伯利兹：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入貝里斯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Belize BBS / PUC / BEL conformity and grid-connection context, 110/220 V 60 Hz revalidation, US-heritage SAE J1772 / CCS1 connector expectations, UL 2202 / UL 2594 safety practice, IEC 61851 and IEC 61000 references, FCC Part 15 EMC context, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与伯利兹BBS / PUC / BEL合格评定及并网背景、110/220 V 60 Hz重新验证、美国体系SAE J1772 / CCS1接口预期、UL 2202 / UL 2594安全实践、IEC 61851和IEC 61000参考、FCC Part 15电磁兼容背景，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與貝里斯BBS / PUC / BEL合格評定及併網背景、110/220 V 60 Hz重新驗證、美國體系SAE J1772 / CCS1接口預期、UL 2202 / UL 2594安全實務、IEC 61851和IEC 61000參考、FCC Part 15電磁相容背景，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Belize, the fundamental practical gap is electrical and connector redesign for a US-heritage 110/220 V, 60 Hz market. China domestic EVSE is commonly designed around 220/380 V, 50 Hz and GB/T connectors. Belize installations should be treated as requiring 60 Hz input revalidation, 120/240 V class configuration, BEL grid and site coordination, and SAE J1772 Type 1 AC plus CCS1 DC connector hardware, not IEC Type 2 / CCS2 and not GB/T. Safety evidence should be prepared in the US-direction UL 2202 / UL 2594 framework where requested, with IEC 61851 and IEC 61000 evidence as supporting references. Exporters should verify the current BBS conformity route, PUC/BEL project requirements, HS code, and site specification before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入伯利兹时，根本性实务差距是必须面向美国体系110/220 V、60 Hz市场进行电气和接口重新设计。中国国内EVSE通常围绕220/380 V、50 Hz和GB/T接口设计。伯利兹安装应按60 Hz输入重新验证、120/240 V等级配置、BEL电网和场地协调，以及SAE J1772 Type 1交流和CCS1直流接口硬件处理；不得按IEC Type 2 / CCS2或GB/T处理。安全证据在项目要求时应按美国方向UL 2202 / UL 2594框架准备，IEC 61851和IEC 61000证据作为支持参考。出口商应在出货前核实当前BBS合格评定路径、PUC/BEL项目要求、HS编码和场地规范。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入貝里斯時，根本性實務差距是必須面向美國體系110/220 V、60 Hz市場進行電氣和接口重新設計。中國國內EVSE通常圍繞220/380 V、50 Hz和GB/T接口設計。貝里斯安裝應按60 Hz輸入重新驗證、120/240 V等級配置、BEL電網和場地協調，以及SAE J1772 Type 1交流和CCS1直流接口硬體處理；不得按IEC Type 2 / CCS2或GB/T處理。安全證據在項目要求時應按美國方向UL 2202 / UL 2594框架準備，IEC 61851和IEC 61000證據作為支持參考。出口商應在出貨前核實當前BBS合格評定路徑、PUC/BEL項目要求、HS編碼和場地規範。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BBS scope determination, PUC approval, BEL interconnection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Belize conformity assessment rules, PUC and BEL requirements, SAE / UL / IEC standard editions, connector requirements, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BBS适用范围裁定、PUC批准、BEL并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行伯利兹合格评定规则、PUC和BEL要求、SAE / UL / IEC标准版本、接口要求及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BBS適用範圍裁定、PUC批准、BEL併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行貝里斯合格評定規則、PUC和BEL要求、SAE / UL / IEC標準版本、接口要求及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
